feat(major): NeoUI rebrand + demo site revamp + four-project demo restructure + all demo pages standardized (#137)

Complete the RC release: brand rename NeoBlazorUI → NeoUI with full
namespace flattening, restructure the demo solution into four dedicated
Blazor hosting projects covering all render modes with best-in-class
developer ergonomics, introduce a component-driven Demo* infrastructure
and ComponentRegistry, migrate all 97+ demo pages to the standardized
structure, and migrate the Tailwind CSS pipeline from a standalone exe
to npm.

PR: https://github.com/jimmyps/blazor-shadcn-ui/pull/137

---

## BREAKING CHANGES

### Brand Rename & Namespace Flattening

All public namespaces, NuGet package IDs, assembly names, and service
registration methods have changed. Consumers must update their using
directives and DI registrations.

**Package / project renames:**

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| `NeoBlazorUI.Components` | `NeoUI.Blazor` |
| `NeoBlazorUI.Primitives` | `NeoUI.Blazor.Primitives` |
| `NeoBlazorUI.Icons.Lucide` | `NeoUI.Icons.Lucide` |
| `NeoBlazorUI.Icons.Heroicons` | `NeoUI.Icons.Heroicons` |
| `NeoBlazorUI.Icons.Feather` | `NeoUI.Icons.Feather` |

**Filesystem renames (`git mv`):**

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| `BlazorUI.sln` | `NeoUI.Blazor.sln` |
| `src/BlazorUI.Components/` | `src/NeoUI.Blazor/` |
| `src/BlazorUI.Primitives/` | `src/NeoUI.Blazor.Primitives/` |
| `demo/BlazorUI.Demo/` | `demo/NeoUI.Demo/` → then → `NeoUI.Demo.Auto` |
| `demo/BlazorUI.Demo.Shared/` | `demo/NeoUI.Demo.Shared/` |
| `demo/BlazorUI.Demo.Client/` | `demo/NeoUI.Demo.Client/` → then → `NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client` |
| `wwwroot/blazorui.css` | `wwwroot/components.css` |
| `wwwroot/css/blazorui-input.css` | `wwwroot/css/components-input.css` |

**Namespace flattening:**
- All per-component sub-namespaces collapsed into package root
- `_Imports.razor` restructured: single root import replaces per-component
  using directives; all per-component `@using` directives removed from
  97+ demo pages
- `Utilities` and `Contexts` sub-namespaces merged into their parents;
  `Services` retained
- Chart types scoped to `NeoUI.Blazor.Charts` (conventional plural
  namespace, avoids IntelliSense pollution)

**Component renames (disambiguation):**

| Old | New | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `Grid<TItem>` | `DataGrid<TItem>` | Clash with chart's internal `Grid` type |
| `GridColumn` | `DataGridColumn` | Same |
| `GridDefinition` | `DataGridDefinition` | Same |
| `Chart.Tooltip` | `ChartTooltip` | Clash with styled `Tooltip` |
| `Command` | `CommandContent` | Razor RZ1042 void-element clash |

Primitive components gain `Primitive` suffix where a styled counterpart
exists (`AccordionPrimitive`, `CheckboxPrimitive`, etc.). Infrastructure
primitives with no styled counterpart (`FloatingPortal`, Table family,
`DialogPortal`, `SheetPortal`, `NavigationMenuRoot`) keep no suffix.

**Service registration:**
- `AddBlazorUIPrimitives()` → `AddNeoUIPrimitives()`
- `AddBlazorUIComponents()` → `AddNeoUIComponents()`

**Runtime token renames:**

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| `blazorui:visible` / `blazorui:hidden` (JS events) | `neoui:visible` / `neoui:hidden` |
| `blazorui-portal-root` (DOM id) | `neoui-portal-root` |
| `.blazorui-portal` (CSS class) | `.neoui-portal` |
| `blazorui:collapsible:` (localStorage prefix) | `neoui:collapsible:` |
| `_content/NeoBlazorUI.Components/` | `_content/NeoUI.Blazor/` |
| `_content/NeoBlazorUI.Primitives/` | `_content/NeoUI.Blazor.Primitives/` |
| `BuildBlazorUICSS` (MSBuild target) | `BuildNeoUICSS` |
| `blazorui.css` | `components.css` |
| `blazorui-input.css` | `components-input.css` |

**Migration guide (quick reference):**
1. Swap NuGet package IDs (see table above)
2. Replace `@using BlazorUI.Components.*` with `@using NeoUI.Blazor`
3. Change `_content/NeoBlazorUI.Components/blazorui.css` →
   `_content/NeoUI.Blazor/components.css` in `App.razor`/`index.html`
4. Rename `AddBlazorUIComponents()` / `AddNeoBlazorUIPrimitives()` in
   `Program.cs`
5. Rename component tags: `<Grid>` → `<DataGrid>`, `<Command>` →
   `<CommandContent>`, chart `<Tooltip>` → `<ChartTooltip>`
6. `blazorui:collapsible:*` localStorage keys become `neoui:collapsible:*`
   (existing persisted state treated as missing on first load; no data loss)

---

## Demo Solution Restructure — All Blazor Rendering Modes (v3)

The demo solution has been reorganised into **four dedicated,
purpose-named projects** so each render mode can be started directly
without any configuration switching:

| Project | Render Mode | HTTPS Port |
|---|---|---|
| `NeoUI.Demo.Auto` | Interactive Auto (Server-first → WASM) | 7172 |
| `NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client` | WASM satellite for Auto | — |
| `NeoUI.Demo.Server` | Interactive Server only | 7173 |
| `NeoUI.Demo.Wasm` | Standalone WebAssembly | 7174 |

**Rename & new projects:**
- `NeoUI.Demo` → `NeoUI.Demo.Auto`; `NeoUI.Demo.Client` →
  `NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client`
- `NeoUI.Demo.Server` and `NeoUI.Demo.Wasm` are **new projects**
  created from scratch

**Shared asset strategy:**
- All shared `wwwroot` assets (`css/`, `images/`, `styles/`,
  `favicon.png`) moved from the old Client project into
  `NeoUI.Demo.Shared/wwwroot` with `StaticWebAssetBasePath="."` so
  every host project picks them up at root path automatically
- Tailwind CSS build target consolidated into `NeoUI.Demo.Shared.csproj`

**`NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client` workaround removed:**
- `RemoveIndexHtmlFromStaticAssets` MSBuild target removed (no longer
  needed now that `NeoUI.Demo.Wasm` owns its own `index.html`)
- `ResolveStaticWebAssetsInputsDependsOn` override removed
- `NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client/wwwroot/index.html` deleted

**`NeoUI.Demo.Shared` (Razor Class Library):**
- Single source of truth for all 97+ demo pages, shared layouts
  (`MainLayout`, `DarkModeToggle`, `SpotlightCommandPalette`),
  `Routes.razor`, and services (`ThemeService`, `CollapsibleStateService`,
  `MockDataService`, `KeyboardShortcutService`); zero code duplication
  across host projects; flat `_Imports.razor`

**`NeoUI.Demo.Auto` (Blazor Web App — Auto Mode):**
- InteractiveAuto rendermode (server-first for fast initial load, then
  WASM); references both `NeoUI.Demo.Shared` and `NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client`

**`NeoUI.Demo.Auto.Client` (WASM satellite):**
- `WASM_STANDALONE` compile constant gates root component registration
  for standalone vs. referenced use; `StaticWebAssetBasePath` prevents
  asset conflicts when referenced as a project dependency

**`NeoUI.Demo.Server` (Blazor Web App — Server only):**
- InteractiveServer rendermode; references `NeoUI.Demo.Shared`

**`NeoUI.Demo.Wasm` (Standalone WebAssembly):**
- InteractiveWebAssembly rendermode; hosts its own `index.html`
- Polished `/Error` page using NeoUI `Card` + `Alert` (destructive) +
  `Button`; adapted for WASM (no `HttpContext`, no server guidance card)

**Polished host-specific UX:**
- Themed `blazor-error-ui` bottom-bar notification across all three
  server/client host projects, using CSS theme variables — renders even
  if Blazor itself crashes
- `ReconnectModal` component (native `<dialog>`) added to
  `NeoUI.Demo.Auto` and `NeoUI.Demo.Server`; replaces the default
  browser reconnect UI with a fully themed modal covering: Reconnecting,
  Retrying (live countdown), Failed (Retry button), Paused (Resume
  button), Resume Failed states; driven by CSS classes Blazor sets on
  `#components-reconnect-modal` + ES module JS; intentionally absent
  from `NeoUI.Demo.Wasm` (no SignalR circuit)

**Architecture documented:**
- Added `demo/ARCHITECTURE.md` covering the four-project layout,
  rendering modes, static asset strategy, running instructions, and
  troubleshooting

---

## Tailwind CSS Pipeline — Standalone Exe → npm

- Add `package.json` to `NeoUI.Demo.Shared` and `NeoUI.Blazor` with
  `@tailwindcss/cli` and `build:css` / `watch:css` npm scripts
- Add `NpmInstall` MSBuild target (`BeforeTargets="BeforeBuild"`) that
  auto-runs `npm install` when `node_modules/` is absent
- Update `BuildTailwindCSS` / `BuildNeoUICSS` MSBuild targets to call
  `npm run build:css` via `DependsOnTargets="NpmInstall"` instead of
  invoking `tailwindcss.exe`; remove Windows-only restriction
- **Root cause of `app.css` 404 in CI:** `**/wwwroot/css/app.css` was
  gitignored; Blazor's static web asset manifest needed the file before
  `dotnet build`; the previous `BeforeTargets="BeforeBuild"` MSBuild
  target generated it too late
- All three CI/CD workflows (`main`, `dev/staging`, `dev/preview`)
  replace the "Download Tailwind CLI" PowerShell step with
  `actions/setup-node@v4` → `npm install` → `npm run build:css` run
  from `demo/NeoUI.Demo.Shared/` **before** `dotnet build`
- NuGet publish workflow unchanged — `components.css` remains
  pre-committed; CI skips the build target via `'$(CI)' != 'true'`
- `tailwind.config.js` restored to correct location
  `demo/NeoUI.Demo.Shared/tailwind.config.js`; content paths corrected;
  stale `../NeoUI.Demo.Shared/**/*` entry removed
- Exclude unnecessary build-time JSON from published output

---

## ComponentRegistry & Navigation Infrastructure

- Introduce `ComponentRegistry` with `ComponentCategoryInfo` /
  `ComponentCategories` for a structured, category-driven component
  catalogue organizing all 85+ components (Form, Overlay, Navigation,
  Display, etc.)
- Registry entries carry: slug, title, description, icon name,
  category/tags, and tier (`Component` vs `Primitive`)
- Stable ordering used for prev/next navigation across all ~80 demo pages
- Helper methods: find entry by route/slug, get prev/next entry,
  enumerate grouped items
- All three navigation surfaces now read from the registry:
  - **Left sidebar** menu
  - **`/components` index page** (card grid)
  - **Spotlight Command Palette** (global search)
- Add chart sub-pages as registry entries; audit registry for
  completeness; remove non-existent entries (`command-library`,
  `page-transition`, `datagrid/data-mutation`, `datagrid/refresh`)
- Drive DataGrid sidebar navigation from registry

**Layout & UX:**
- Revamp sidebar navigation surfaces to be registry-driven
- Add breadcrumb to the page header via `MainLayout`; breadcrumb shows
  active page context and prev/next buttons when browsing any demo page
- Add `DemoPageSubNav` component for in-page sub-page navigation
  rendered in both header and footer
- Polish overall layout styles and UX consistency
- Auto-initialize `theme.js`; use `Assets` directive for all static
  resource references

---

## Demo* Display Components

- Introduce `DemoBlock`, `DemoSection`, `DemoPageHeader`,
  `DemoPropsTable`, `DemoPropRow`, `DemoPageNav`, `DemoPageSubNav`,
  `DemoCopyButton`
- Add `AdditionalContent` `RenderFragment` slot to `DemoBlock` for
  inline supplementary/info content alongside live previews
- Add syntax-highlighted code block component with `ScrollArea`
  integration for long-snippet overflow
- Revive App.razor Setup section in ThemeSwitcherDemo with stylesheet
  list and copy buttons
- Refactor `AlertDemo` as the reference implementation for the new
  `Demo*` system

---

## Demo Page Migration — All 97+ Pages

All demo pages now follow: `DemoPageHeader` → `DemoSection` +
`DemoBlock` (with static code string constants) → `DemoPropsTable` →
`DemoPageNav`. All existing `@code` state, `@bind-*` bindings, and
event handlers are preserved throughout. Code snippets and props tables
extracted to `CodeExamples/` partial `.cs` classes.

**Batch 1 (14 pages):** Spinner, Typography, Toggle, ToggleGroup, Empty,
NativeSelect, AspectRatio, Drawer, Popover, Select, Slider, Pagination,
Kbd, Breadcrumb

**Batch 2 (13 pages):** InputOtp, Resizable, Badge, Carousel, Textarea,
DialogService, Combobox, ScrollArea, DatePicker, Skeleton, Label, Card,
Checkbox; retrofit `AdditionalContent` in AspectRatioDemo and
NumericInputDemo

**Batch 3:** FileUpload, RangeSlider, RichTextEditor, RadioGroup, Switch,
Avatar, Button, Tooltip

**Batch 4 (17 pages):** ThemeSwitcher, MultiSelect, Item, DataTable,
Toast, Collapsible, ButtonGroup, Sheet, InputGroup, Menubar, ContextMenu,
Input, Motion, Field, MaskedInput, Command, CurrencyInput —
`CommandContent` used instead of `Command`

**Batch 5:** Sidebar (12 sub-demos), Dialog, DropdownMenu

**Batches 6 & 7:** All remaining primitive demos — NavigationMenu,
TimePicker, Calendar, HoverCard, Separator, NumericInput, and more

**Primitives revamp:** all primitives demos converted to the new Demo
component structure

**DataGrid (11 sub-pages):** Convert Basic, Templating, Selection,
Transactions, SortingFiltering, State, ServerSide, Advanced, Theming,
DataMutation, and RefreshDemo from raw HTML `<section>`/`<details>` to
`DemoSection`/`DemoBlock`; add `DemoPageHeader` to DataGridDemo;
populate `_visualStylesCode` and `_densityCode`; remove empty `Code`
params from info-only DemoBlocks; reduce alert-button spacing to `mt-2`

**Chart demos:** complete comprehensive chart demo revamp; remove `Card`
containers from all 7 chart-type demo pages and `_interactiveCode`
snippets in CodeExamples files; sub-page navigation in both header and
footer

---

## Code Organization

- Create `CodeExamples/` subfolder for all component demos: extract
  code snippets and props tables into partial `.cs` classes
- Take primitives `CodeExamples` from the revamp branch; fix
  input-variant performance sections
- Remove all `Installation`, `Usage`, and `Usage Notes` `DemoSection`
  blocks from component demos

---

## Content Quality Pass & Bug Fixes

**Reference-alignment fixes:** AlertDialogDemo, AspectRatioDemo,
AvatarDemo, BadgeDemo, ButtonDemo (Dark Mode, Browser Compatibility, RTL
rename), ButtonGroupDemo, CardDemo, CollapsibleDemo, ContextMenuDemo,
DrawerDemo, FieldDemo, InputGroupDemo, MaskedInputDemo (ZIP Code, Custom
Masks, Disabled/Readonly splits, Without Mask Display), NativeSelectDemo,
RadioGroupDemo, ResizableDemo, ScrollAreaDemo, SelectDemo, SheetDemo,
SkeletonDemo, SwitchDemo, ToastDemo (split sections + Installation/Usage),
AccordionDemo (4th FAQ item), BreadcrumbDemo (Settings Navigation),
CommandDemo (full Spotlight/Height Animation restore), CurrencyInputDemo
(split Disabled/Readonly/Required), InputDemo (3-field validation form)

**Bug fixes:** HTML entity encoding in `DemoPropRow` type columns
(`<TItem>`, `<TData>`); ZIndex default in ThemeSwitcherDemo; ContextMenu
demo image size; Tooltip API split into 4 DemoSections, remove invalid
`ComponentName` param; FieldDemo `Title` error; `ResponsiveNav` `Class`
error; expand NavigationMenu items with `min-height` wrapper; restore
MotionDemo, ThemeSwitcherDemo, MarkdownEditorDemo to reference quality;
revert AccordionDemo code example to correct version

---

## CI/CD, Solution & Docs

- Solution renamed: `BlazorUI.sln` → `NeoUI.Blazor.sln`
- `nuget-publish.yml` — `case` block updated to new `csproj` paths and
  `NeoUI.*` package IDs
- Three Azure deploy workflows updated: `AZURE_WEBAPP_PACKAGE_PATH` and
  `WORKING_DIRECTORY` updated; "Download Tailwind CLI" step replaced with
  `actions/setup-node` + npm steps in all three
- Release scripts (`release-components.sh`, `release-primitives.sh`)
  updated for NeoUI brand
- Icon codegen scripts updated for new namespace output
- Update GitHub README and repository assets
- Update `CHANGELOG.md` and all documentation/LLM context files for
  NeoUI brand
- Bump version to rc.1

---
